calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: R. Edwards/ M. Chin, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Richard Brody, Esq. for Petitioner: Marcella M. Mickey, present as Guardian ad litem for Shannon Mae Mosley, was sworn and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Order approving compromise for Attorney's Fees; Medical Expenses; and Costs as stated in order.
A net balance of $36,093.73 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells fargo Bank, 52nd Avenue, Arveda, CO., for minor and no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders for Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
